# netbox_prefix (Data Source)

Fetches a single prefix from Netbox by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a single prefix by ID.
data "netbox_prefix" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "prefix_cidr" {
  value = data.netbox_prefix.example.prefix
}

output "prefix_status" {
  value = data.netbox_prefix.example.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the prefix.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description for the prefix.
- `prefix` (String) The subnet in CIDR format.
- `status` (String) The status of the prefix.
